about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Get to know {{name}} better.
about.storyTitle: Your Best Holiday Partner in Bali
about.storyP1: {{name}} is here to deliver premium travel experiences on the Island of the Gods. With over a decade of experience, we know exactly how to create a memorable holiday.
about.storyP2: From cultural tours and nature adventures to private transport rental — everything is designed with your comfort and satisfaction in mind.

trusted.title: Trusted
trusted.desc: Thousands of travelers satisfied with our service over the years.

friendly.title: Friendly Service
friendly.desc: Friendly drivers and team, ready to help whenever you need.

flexible.title: Flexible
flexible.desc: Itineraries can be fully tailored to your wishes.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Well-kept fleet and handpicked destinations for the best experience.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to book? We're ready to help.
contact.waEnquiry: Hello, I would like to ask about your tour packages.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: Looks like you're lost. Let's get you back on the right route.

whatsapp.greeting: Hi! 👋 How can we help with your holiday in Bali?

topDestinations.title: Top Destinations
topDestinations.lead: Four routes our guests keep coming back for. Swipe through, then open one to build your own day — duration, vehicle, and the activities you actually want.

destinationDetail.notFoundText: The destination you are looking for is unavailable or has been moved.
destinationDetail.enquiryText: {{name}} is not yet a fixed-price package, but we arrange it as a private tour. Message us and we will build the itinerary and quote around your dates.
destinationDetail.enquiryMsg: Hello Bali Arga Tour, I would like to arrange a private tour to {{name}}. Could you send me an itinerary and a quote?

booking.durationHint: Counted from hotel pick-up to drop-off. One price for the whole party, not per person.
booking.activitiesHint: Optional. Paid activities are charged per guest, so each one is multiplied by your {{count}} guests.
booking.formHint: We only use these to confirm your booking over WhatsApp.
booking.additionalPlaceholder: Anything else we should know — dietary needs, child seats, flight times…
booking.paymentIntro: This website never processes payment. Your booking is confirmed by a real person over WhatsApp, and only then do we send payment instructions.
booking.paymentWarning: QRIS, bank transfer and WISE are our only payment channels. If anyone asks you to pay any other way, it is not us — please check with us on our official WhatsApp number first.

wa.intro: I would like to book a tour.
wa.name: Name
wa.disclaimer: I understand that the final availability and price must be confirmed by Bali Arga Tour.

booking.vehicleIncluded: Private air-conditioned vehicle, driver, petrol, and parking are included in the tour price.

vehicleBooking.hint: Vehicle rental only, with driver. Tours are booked separately and already include their vehicle.
vehicleBooking.destinationPlaceholder: e.g. Ubud, Canggu, Ngurah Rai Airport
vehicleBooking.messagePlaceholder: Anything else we should know — child seats, luggage, flight times…
vehicleBooking.capacityWarning: {{passengers}} passengers will not fit in this vehicle, which seats {{seats}}. Let us know and we will arrange a second one.
vehicleBooking.enquiry: Hello Bali Arga Tour, I would like to ask about renting the {{name}}.

wa.intro: I would like to book a vehicle.
wa.name: Name
wa.closing: Please confirm availability and the final price. Thank you.
